summary: Reuters reported Snap would lay off about 16% of its staff as it reorganized parts of the business and leaned further into AI-driven products and operations.
evidenceQuote: Snap to lay off about 16% of staff.
notes: Added from the Reuters report Matt supplied. Use restrained framing until a stronger direct company quote is available on how explicitly the reduction was tied to AI versus broader restructuring.

sources.name: Reuters
sources.quote: Snap to lay off about 16% of staff.
